result: **Summary:** The knowledge file is well-constructed overall with one minor inconsistency. The `value` attribute description should include the "XHTMLのvalue属性" designation to match the pattern used for other similar attributes (name, disabled, onchange, autofocus) and to match the source documentation.

findings.description: The value attribute description is missing the type designation 'XHTMLのvalue属性' that appears in the source. Similar attributes (name, autofocus, disabled, onchange) all include their type designation (XHTML/HTML5) in the knowledge file, but value does not.
findings.source_evidence: Source says: 'XHTMLのvalue属性。チェックありの場合に使用する値。デフォルトは ``1`` 。' but Knowledge file only captures 'チェック時の値'
